title: More Nonsense Limerick 83
content:
There was an old Lady of Winchelsea,
    Who said, "If you needle or pin shall see
    On the floor of my room, 
    Sweep it up with the broom!"
    That exhaustive old Lady of Winchelsea!
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 83" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
